fields.title: Manuscript Editing
fields.short_description: Professional structural, line, and copy editing by our senior editorial team.
fields.full_description: Our editorial team works closely with authors to refine their manuscripts at every level — from high-level structural feedback to meticulous line editing and final copy-editing passes.

fields.title: Book Design & Production
fields.short_description: Award-winning cover design and interior typesetting for print and digital formats.
fields.full_description: From concept to finished book, our design studio creates visually stunning covers and elegantly typeset interiors that stand out in any market.

fields.title: Rights & Distribution
fields.short_description: Global rights management and distribution across all major retail and library channels.
fields.full_description: Our rights team actively pursues translation deals, foreign rights sales, and licensing opportunities in over 40 territories worldwide.

fields.title: Marketing & Publicity
fields.short_description: Strategic campaigns, press outreach, and digital marketing to maximise your book's reach.
fields.full_description: Our publicity team crafts bespoke campaigns combining traditional media, social strategy, and influencer outreach to give each title the launch it deserves.
fields.features: ["Press releases", "Social media strategy", "Influencer outreach", "Launch events", "Review copies"]
